login.biometricHint: Biometric verification will be requested automatically after your password
login.storageWarning: Data is stored in this device's browser. Clearing browser cache or storage may cause irreversible loss of all your data.

signup.choosePasswordHint: Choose a password that you will remember. In case of loss it will not be possible to recover the data!

masterPassword.title: Master Password
masterPassword.description: Choose a single password that will be used to encrypt all your web accounts and credit, debit or prepaid cards.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero Knowledge
zeroKnowledge.description: No plaintext data is ever saved. Security is further strengthened by biometric authentication or two-factor authentication.

backupRestore.title: Backup & Restore
backupRestore.description: Your data is encrypted and saved only on this device. You can back up manually by exporting the database from settings, or enable automatic sync with Google Drive.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoLockDescription: Automatically lock the app after a period of inactivity. The app also locks faster when you switch to another tab or app.
settings.autoLockDisabledWarning: Disabling auto-lock is not recommended. Anyone with access to your device could see your passwords.

sync.title: Google Drive Sync
sync.syncAutomatically: Automatically sync your encrypted data across all your devices using Google Drive.
sync.reauthNeeded: Google Drive Sync: session expired. Go to Settings to reconnect.

export.title: Export Database
export.description: Download an encrypted backup of all your profiles. The file will contain all your data in encrypted format.
export.shortDescription: Download an encrypted backup of all your profiles.
export.successDownload: Database exported successfully! Check your downloads.
export.successClipboard: Backup copied to clipboard! Paste it in a text file to save.
export.allMethodsFailed: All export methods failed. Please try on desktop browser.

import.title: Import Database
import.warning: Warning: Importing will replace all current data. Make sure to export first if you want to keep your current profiles.
import.warningShort: Warning: Importing will replace all current data. Make sure to export first.
import.successFull: Import successful! Config: {{config}}, Profiles: {{profiles}}. Logging out...

deleteAll.title: Delete All Data
deleteAll.description: Permanently delete all profiles and reset the app. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAll.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This will permanently remove all profiles and reset the app. This action cannot be undone.

security.title: Security Note
security.description: Your exported backup file is encrypted with your master password. Keep your password safe - it's required to import the data on any device.
security.shortDescription: Your exported backup is encrypted with your master password. Keep it safe — it's required to import on any device.

biometric.title: Biometric Authentication
biometric.description: Use fingerprint or face recognition to unlock the app
biometric.notAvailable: Biometric authentication not available on this device
biometric.deviceNoSupport: Your device doesn't support Face ID, Touch ID, Windows Hello, or fingerprint authentication.
biometric.enabledDescription: Quick unlock is enabled using {{type}}. You can still use your password anytime.
biometric.disabledDescription: Enable {{type}} for quick and secure access without typing your password.
biometric.note: Note: Your encrypted data remains protected by your master password. Biometric authentication provides convenient access on this device only.
biometric.disableConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable {{type}}? You'll need to use your password to unlock.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.noProfilesDescription: Add your first profile to get started
profiles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?
profiles.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.

profileForm.twoFactorHint: Add your 2FA secret key manually or scan a QR code

messages.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.

health.title: Password Health
health.noAccounts: No web accounts with passwords to analyze.
health.offlineMessage: Breach check requires an internet connection. Duplicate and weak password analysis is available offline.
health.allClearMessage: No compromised, reused, or weak passwords detected.
health.hibpInfo: Breach data is checked via HaveIBeenPwned using k-anonymity. Your passwords are never sent over the network — only the first 5 characters of the SHA-1 hash are transmitted.

install.title: Install OwnVault
install.subtitle: Quick access from the Home screen

step1.title: Select SQLite Database
step1.description: Upload the database file (.db, .sqlite, .db3) from your old SafeProfiles app

step2.title: Enter Old App Password
step2.description: This is the master password you used in the old mobile app
step2.warningMessage: This is the OLD app password, not the current one. It's only used to decrypt the imported data.

step3.title: Preview Profiles
step3.description: These profiles will be imported into your current database
step3.securityNote: Data will be encrypted with the NEW security schema (AES-GCM + DEK). Never saved in plaintext.

step4.title: Import Complete!
step4.description: Your profiles have been successfully imported
step4.cleanupMessage: Memory has been securely wiped. You can delete the old database file.

errors.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Select a .db, .db3, .sqlite or .sqlite3 file
errors.decryptionFailed: Decryption failed. Check password and file.

syncConflict.title: Sync Conflict
syncConflict.subtitle: Local and cloud data differ. Choose which version to keep.
syncConflict.warning: Warning: the version not chosen will be overwritten. This cannot be undone.

support.title: Support the project
support.sectionDescription: All features are free and always will be. Keeping them running takes time and resources. If you believe in this project, every contribution makes a difference.
support.contactDescription: Found a bug or have a feature idea? Get in touch directly.
support.donateDescription: Support development with a small donation.

modal.title: Buy me a coffee
modal.subtitle: Choose an amount and your preferred payment method

qrScanner.title: Scan 2FA QR Code
qrScanner.instruction: Point the camera at the QR code. Detection is automatic.
qrScanner.invalidQR: Invalid QR code. Please scan a valid 2FA QR code (otpauth).
qrScanner.noSecret: Secret key not found in QR code.
qrScanner.permissionDeniedMsg: Please allow camera access in your browser settings to scan QR codes.
qrScanner.noCameraMsg: This device has no available camera.
qrScanner.errorMsg: An error occurred. Try entering the key manually instead.
qrScanner.enableChrome: Chrome/Edge: tap the camera icon in the address bar
qrScanner.enableFirefox: Firefox: tap the permissions icon next to the URL

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & Disclaimer
privacy.intro: OwnVault is a password manager that runs entirely in the user's browser. The application does not require an account and does not collect personal data.
privacy.storage: All data entered is stored exclusively on the user's device using the browser's local storage technologies (IndexedDB) and is stored in encrypted form. No information is sent to or stored on servers owned by the application author.
privacy.noTracking: The application does not use cookies, tracking tools, or analytics services.
privacy.thirdPartiesIntro: Some optional features may communicate with third-party services. In particular:
privacy.hibp: the compromised password check uses the HaveIBeenPwned API via the k-anonymity model, which sends only a hash prefix of the password and never the password itself;
privacy.gdrive: the optional cloud sync feature can save an encrypted backup to the user's Google Drive via Google APIs. Data is sent already encrypted and is not accessible to the application author.
privacy.userControl: Data remains under the full control of the user. Clearing browser data, using private browsing mode, or changing devices may result in the loss of saved information.
privacy.disclaimer: This software is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind. The author is not responsible for any data loss, unauthorized access, or damages arising from the use of the application.
privacy.acceptance: By using the application, the user accepts these terms.
